events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario: heavy industrial site, conveyor systems, missing nip-point guards (HAZ), work actively in progress. Need identify hazards, severity, immediate controls. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk high or critical? Missing nip-point guards on conveyor in industrial site: nip points can cause amputation, entanglement, severe injury. Active work means exposure. Severity critical? The schema risk includes critical. Missing guards is a serious hazard, immediate danger. I'd choose critical. Work_stage in-progress. Component conditions: installed-defective? non-compliant? Missing guards means non-compliant (not installed per CEMA/OSHA). Could also be installed-defective if guard missing is a defect. The categories: installed-defective, non-compliant. Both apply. percent_complete unknown; maybe 0 or estimate. Since scenario only mentions missing guards, overall progress maybe 75? But not asked. Could set 0 if unknown? The schema says numeric estimate of overall progress. We can estimate 60? But no basis. Maybe set 0. value 0. sound_source empty? Not audio. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list. findings: missing nip-point guards exposing workers to entanglement/amputation; non-compliant with OSHA 1910.212 and CEMA. actions: immediately stop work in affected area; install proper nip-point guards per CEMA/OSHA; lockout/tagout before installing; inspect all conveyor pinch/nip points; retrain workers; do not restart until guards verified. references: OSHA 1910.212(a)(1) general requirements for machine guarding; CEMA (Conveyor Equipment Manufacturers Association) safety labels/ guarding guidelines. Need JSON only, no prose. Ensure valid JSON.

    "Verify guards are securely mounted and cannot be easily bypassed before returning to service",
